151 P3B P3B_NR_MOTION_ACTV 39b(P3b)Nursing Rehab: Range of Motion (Active) CHAR 1 Indicates the extent to which the patient received active range of motion nursing rehabilitation intervention. Range of moition exercise is a program of exercises performed by the patient, with cueing or supervision by staff, that are planned, scheduled, and documented.
152 P3C P3C_NR_SPLINT 39c(P3c)Nursing Rehab: Splint/Brace
